meta.title: Knockdown of piRNA pathway proteins results in enhanced Semliki Forest virus production in mosquito cells

bodyHtml:
• Journal of General Virology (2013), 94, part 7, pp. 1680-1689; doi: 10.1099/vir.0.053850-0

In several instances in this paper piRNA was introduced erroneously where Piwi is the correct term. This has been corrected in the online version of this paper. Also, the corresponding author’s email address was published incorrectly and should appear as Esther.Schnettler@glasgow.ac.uk. The publishers apologize for these errors. doi: 10.1099/vir.0.060921-0
